message:
fix: ScanOperator fetchColumns had per-column canSkipPage causing row misalignment

fetchColumns re-checked canSkipPage per-column after findNextPage already
made a uniform page-level skip decision via canSkipPageMultiCol. This
could skip one column's data for a page while keeping another's, causing
row offset misalignment. Removed the redundant per-column skip —
findNextPage's uniform decision is authoritative.
